markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented a vision for positioning Smith.ai as a technical authority in AI calling, starting with call flow design content](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Smith.ai wants to update website content to focus more on AI receptionist services rather than live virtual receptionists](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Priorities are being shifted to make the AI receptionist content updates the top priority](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

## Topics

### Call Flow Design Content Hub

  - [GrowthX presented a mockup of a content hub for call flow design using Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Hub would include a main 5000-word pillar article and supporting content on technical components, design principles, implementation, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Visual diagrams and hover-text definitions for technical terms were suggested as additions](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Plan is to start with the main pillar article, then add supporting content, before building out the full hub](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)

### Website Content Updates

  - [Smith.ai wants to update features and industry pages to focus more on AI receptionist services rather than live virtual receptionists](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [This is now the top priority due to board visibility and business impact](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Updates needed across \~30 features pages and \~30 industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Goal is to position Smith.ai as an AI receptionist service with human backup, rather than primarily a live virtual receptionist service](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Estimate Template Review

  - [Reviewed design of estimate template created by Raze team](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Suggestions made on layout, terminology, and functionality](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Agreed to add Smith.ai branding in footer rather than header](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Discussed adding logo upload capability for businesses using the template](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prioritize updating website content to focus on AI receptionist services](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Continue work with Raze on estimate and other templates](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Move forward with call flow design content after website updates are complete](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [GrowthX to use new workflow for content refreshes and track SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Team to sync more asynchronously before meetings to maximize meeting time](https://fathom.video/share/SexS-mySu7zHwtqEWKNJsWnvpFVZtUky?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
